title: Rising Darkness
description: A Horror modpack for NeoForge 1.20.1 with magic mods to help you fight the Horrors. Welcome to Fear :)
body:
Rising Darkness is a totally normal sandbox ~~horror~~ modpack with nothing wrong at all. A happy time for all! Don't stare too long at the darkness as it may make you unhappy. :)

Rising Darkness contains a variety of Horror mods with a sprinkle of magic mods to help you fight back at the horrors. You can play the pack alone if you dare. Or live in fear with your friends with your own server. You can also join the official dedicated server with the menu button and find other people prepared to face their fears.

**For the best experience I recommend using the included Spooklementary Shaders!**

Includes mods like:

- Embers Rekindled
- Ars Nouveau
- Blood Magic
- Mahou Tsukai
- Waystones
- Mystical Agriculture
- Functional Storage

And much more!

**Also includes a dedicated server!**
